final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for pearl milk tea targeting a pink girly aesthetic with summer refreshment vibes.

Style/medium: social media cover design for Xiaohongshu (小红书), soft pastel illustration with dreamy girly aesthetic
Subject: pearl milk tea (boba tea) in a clear cup, visible tapioca pearls at the bottom, condensation droplets on cup surface
Composition: centered product shot with generous negative space for text overlay, 3:4 vertical ratio
Scene/backdrop: minimal soft gradient background, subtle summer elements like floating flower petals or soft bokeh
Lighting/mood: bright diffused daylight, airy and refreshing summer atmosphere
Color palette: soft pink as dominant base, cream/beige from the milk tea as anchor, white highlights for freshness
Materials/textures: glossy plastic cup with realistic condensation, chewy tapioca pearls with slight sheen
Constraints: must work as Xiaohongshu cover thumbnail; text-safe area in upper third
Avoid: dark or moody tones; cluttered backgrounds; realistic human faces; generic stock photo aesthetic
